heading: Enlisted members: officers not to use as servants
label: 7239 Enlisted members: officers not to use as servants
text: No officer of the Army may use an enlisted member of the Army as a servant.
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevised sectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)363910:608.R.S. 1232.The words “in any case whatever” are omitted as surplusage.
